validation.username_min: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters

registerPage.title: Create your MyRelay account
registerPage.description: Use the details you plan to keep using across the platform. A clear username and a valid email make onboarding and access management much smoother.
registerPage.guideItem1: Use an email address you can access right away for verification and recovery.
registerPage.guideItem2: Pick a username your team will recognize quickly in shared spaces.
registerPage.guideItem3: Set a password with at least 8 characters and confirm it exactly.
registerPage.guideItem4: Keep these details personal so permissions and activity stay traceable.
registerPage.nextBody: After registration, you can sign in and continue into the workspace and actions available for your role.
